name: babel-preset
description: Gravity UI Babel preset that bundles commonly needed transforms for modern JavaScript, TypeScript, and React projects. Includes @babel/preset-env, @babel/preset-react, @babel/preset-typescript, decorator support, and runtime helpers.
when_to_use: Configuring Babel for a Gravity UI or Yandex-ecosystem project
When you need TypeScript, React JSX, and decorator support in one preset
Replacing multiple individual Babel presets with a single opinionated preset
avoid: Not suitable as-is if you need a radically different babel-preset-env target — pass custom env options instead
TypeScript support is opt-in (set `typescript: true`) and is disabled by default
how_to_use: Install with `npm install --save-dev @gravity-ui/babel-preset`. Add to `.babelrc`: `{ "presets": [["@gravity-ui/babel-preset", { "env": {}, "runtime": { "useESModules": true }, "typescript": true, "react": { "runtime": "automatic" } }]] }`.
